assertions.description: A screenshot file was committed to the PR for each affected dashboard
assertions.evidence: Files after-overview.png (66004 bytes) and after-deploy-freq.png (66145 bytes) were successfully created in v2/screenshots/

assertions.description: The screenshot file name clearly identifies which dashboard it belongs to
assertions.evidence: Files named after-overview.png and after-deploy-freq.png — clearly map to the overview and deployment frequency dashboards using the dashboard UID slug

assertions.description: Only post-change (after) screenshots are present — no before screenshots
assertions.evidence: No before-*.png files exist in the outputs directory. Only after-overview.png and after-deploy-freq.png are present.

assertions.description: Screenshots are taken of Grafana at http://localhost:3004 with panels fully loaded
assertions.evidence: Screenshots taken with --wait-for-timeout=5000 to allow panels to load. File sizes (66KB each) indicate rendered content, not blank pages (which would be ~5-10KB).

notes: Without the skill, the agent can accomplish this task using copilot-instructions.md guidance, but requires reading and parsing multiple sources to determine the workflow, dashboard UIDs, URL patterns, and screenshot conventions.
